emails.subject: BOM/Reliant Ring Trades
emails.body: BOM/Reliant Ring Trades Geoff Attached for your approval are four confirmations for the Ring Trades done among Enron, Reliant, and Bank of Montreal: You will note that an Exhibit A is attached to each confirm but can you tell me from whom at both counterparties I can obtain the Exhibit B (transaction b/t Reliant and BOM) in order to attach that as well. Please review and advise. Thanks, Diane 3.0443

emails.subject: BOM/Reliant Ring Trades
emails.body: BOM/Reliant Ring Trades Geoff Attached for your approval are four confirmations for the Ring Trades done among Enron, Reliant, and Bank of Montreal: You will note that an Exhibit A is attached to each confirm but can you tell me from whom at both counterparties I can obtain the Exhibit B (transaction b/t Reliant and BOM) in order to attach that as well. Please review and advise. Thanks, Diane 3.0443

emails.subject: RE: BOM/Reliant Ring Trades
emails.body: RE: BOM/Reliant Ring Trades The confirms look good. Send them with Exhibit A and have them return signed copies that include Exhibit B, which will be a copy of the confirm b/w BMO and Reliant. Call me if you have any questions. Geof 3-7058
